title: The Central Goods and Services Tax Act, 2017
full_text: The Central Goods and Services Tax Act, 2017 केंद्रीयमालऔरसेवाकरअधिनियम, 2017 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 201712 Act Number: 12 Enactment Date: 2017-04-12 Act Year: 2017 Short Title: The Central Goods and Services Tax Act, 2017 Hindi Title: केंद्रीयमालऔरसेवाकरअधिनियम, 2017 Long Title: An Act to make a provision for levy and collection of tax on intra-State supply of goods or services or both by the Central Government and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Finance Department: Department of Revenue Enforcement Date: 22nd June, 2017 for sections 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 10, 22, 23, 24, 25, 26, 27, 28, 29, 30, 139, 146 and 164 1st July, 2017 for sections 6 to 9, 11 to 21, 31 to 41, 42 (except proviso to sub-section (9) of S 42), 43 (except proviso to subsection (9) of S 43), 44 to 50, 53 to 138, 140 to 163, 165 to 174. Notification: 22nd June, 2017 vide notification No. G.S.R. 605 (E) dated the 19th June, 2017, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i) for sections 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 10, 22, 23, 24, 25, 26, 27, 28, 29, 30, 139, 146 and 164. 1st July, 2017 vide notification No. G.S.R 658 (E) dated 28th June, 2017, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i) for sections 6 to 9, 11 to 21, 31 to 41, 42 (except proviso to sub-section (9) of S 42), 43 (except proviso to subsection (9) of S 43), 44 to 50, 53 to 138, 140 to 163, 165 to 174.
